sections.paragraph:
ράκος (ρά˘κος, ος, εος, τό,)

I. a ragged garment, a rag, Od., Ar.: in pl. ράκεα, attic ράκη, rags, tatters, Od., Hdt., etc.

2. generally, a strip of cloth, Hdt.: a strip of flesh, Aesch.

II. in pl. rents in the face, wrinkles, Ar.

III. metaph. a rag, remnant, Anon. ap. Arist.; of an old seaman, ἁλίοιο βίου ράκος Anth.
